sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Cover System
special_mechanics.description: Player can enter doors to hide and take cover from enemies; can use crates and other obstacles for cover from enemy fire

special_mechanics.name: Multi-Level Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player can jump over crates and jump up to higher or lower floors with rails, including stairs

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Switching
special_mechanics.description: Standard pistol can be replaced with submachine gun; limited ammo system affects combat options

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is described as run-and-gun action game with platforming and cover mechanics. NES version features password system, hidden bonuses, and harder second mission. Technical details about movement physics are not documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Rolling Thunder (NES)
